response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned, versatile engineer with strong craftsmanship credentials, but his profile does not match this role's core requirement of deep, current C++ expertise. His only professional C++ work was a ~7-month stint in 2007–2008, and C++ is absent from his skills list; his career since has centered on web and full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang). He shows no exposure to industrial automation, MQTT/IoT protocols, IEC 62443, or Secure Development Lifecycle practices, which are central to this position.
strengths: Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work (async I/O, fibers, concurrency) at Sociomantic, demonstrating strong systems-programming fundamentals
React, Node.js, and TypeScript experience, which the role lists as advantageous skills
Strong mentoring and knowledge-sharing record through workshops, courses, and coding dojos
concerns: Professional C++ experience is minimal and dated (roughly seven months in 2007–2008), and C++ is not listed among his current skills
No evidence of industrial automation, IoT protocols (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus), or IEC 62443 / SDL secure-engineering experience
No message-broker or Azure experience shown; background is web platforms rather than networked industrial or embedded systems

key_factors.factor: No industrial cybersecurity or IoT protocol background
